testcase.name: test_thumbnail_text

failure.message: AssertionError: No thumbnails returned assert 'thumbnails' in {'creditsUsed': 1, 'ideas': {'clickbait': ["You Won't Believe productivity!", 'The productivity Secret Nobody Tells You', 'I Tried productivity and THIS Happened', 'Stop! Watch This Before productivity', 'Why productivity Changed Everything'], 'emotional': ['The Truth About productivity', 'Why I Love productivity', 'productivity Will Make You Cry', 'The productivity Journey', 'How productivity Changed My Life'], 'informative': ['How to Master productivity', 'productivity: Complete Guide', 'Everything About productivity', 'productivity Tips & Tricks', 'Learn productivity in 5 Minutes']}, 'topic': 'productivity'}

testcase.failure: tests/test_dashboard_audit.py:131: in test_thumbnail_text assert "thumbnails" in data, "No thumbnails returned" E AssertionError: No thumbnails returned E assert 'thumbnails' in {'creditsUsed': 1, 'ideas': {'clickbait': ["You Won't Believe productivity!", 'The productivity Secret Nobody Tells You', 'I Tried productivity and THIS Happened', 'Stop! Watch This Before productivity', 'Why productivity Changed Everything'], 'emotional': ['The Truth About productivity', 'Why I Love productivity', 'productivity Will Make You Cry', 'The productivity Journey', 'How productivity Changed My Life'], 'informative': ['How to Master productivity', 'productivity: Complete Guide', 'Everything About productivity', 'productivity Tips & Tricks', 'Learn productivity in 5 Minutes']}, 'topic': 'productivity'}

testcase.name: test_admin_stats
testcase.failure: tests/test_dashboard_audit.py:227: in test_admin_stats assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_admin_route_with_non_admin

failure.message: AssertionError: Non-admin accessed admin route assert 404 in [401, 403] + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_dashboard_audit.py:307: in test_admin_route_with_non_admin assert response.status_code in [401, 403], "Non-admin accessed admin route" E AssertionError: Non-admin accessed admin route E assert 404 in [401, 403] E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
